Title: Paris Mayor Grégoire confronts the dark side of his predecessor's legacy
Subhead: Sexual violence in after-school programs has overshadowed the start of the new mayor's term, as he must bear the legacy of Anne Hidalgo, whom he served as first deputy.

Subhead: Facing a possible life sentence, the former physician, now 67, has completely changed his defense strategy. Rwamucyo's appeal trial is set to begin on June 9.

Title: Spain faces logistical headache ahead of August 12 total solar eclipse
Subhead: In two months, part of the country will watch the Sun disappear behind the Moon. Authorities, having only recently grasped the full implications of the event, are now scrambling to catch up.

Title: NBA Finals: Wembanyama pushes Spurs past Knicks as Trump booed
Subhead: The Spurs beat the Knicks 115-112 in Madison Square Garden on Monday to cut the Knicks' lead to 2-1 in the best-of-seven championship series.

Title: Why Europe is unable to defend its industry against the 'second Chinese shock'
Subhead: 'How China is Devouring Europe' (4/4). In recent years, the EU has taken unprecedented measures to combat unfair competition from China. But member states have struggled to develop a more comprehensive strategy.

Subhead: In July 2025, an explosive device and a torn Israeli flag were left in front of a McDonald's in France. After a 10-month investigation, an 85-year-old former press photographer, who claims to be outraged by the war in Gaza, emerged as the main suspect, while a possible accomplice died by suicide on May 7, just before an anti-terrorism operation.

Title: France revives Gratitude Train for the US's 250th anniversary
Subhead: A restored railcar from northern France will retrace the journey of the Gratitude Train, which carried gifts from Le Havre to New York in 1949.

Title: Working-class landmarks in the Paris region are being taken over by luxury and art powers
Subhead: Projects such as Le Large, built on a historic Renault factory site on Seguin island, or at the Maison du Peuple in Paris's northwestern suburbs, illustrate how major corporations are taking over former industrial sites.
